title: Gas prices rally as risk of supply disruptions increase
section_path: Gas prices rally as risk of supply disruptions increase
section_path_text: Gas prices rally as risk of supply disruptions increase
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets edged higher after Beijing slightly eased monetary policy to help support economic growth. Energy markets were pushed higher amid rising risks of supply disruptions. Image reference: 1692655161329 (1).png | assets/2023-08-22_gas-prices-rally-as-risk-of-supply-disruptions-increase_img_169265516132928129_25f77c873973.png
Gas across Europe and Asia extended gains as strike action looms in Australia.
